markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To gather context on operational friction and potential standardization opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Standardization is the top priority.** Inconsistent SEO processes (e.g., strategy creation, keyword research) are a major quality risk, as best practices are not shared.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Scrunch data is a "firehose" without a playbook.** The tool generates high-volume, unstructured data (e.g., 600+ ChatGPT prompts) with no standard process for action or tracking impact.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Looker reporting is a major bottleneck.** Manual data blending is required due to platform-level aggregation differences (GA4 vs. GSC), and ad-hoc client requests cause significant delays.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [**Talal's strategy is to centralize experiments.** He will build a database of internal LLM/AEO tests to identify and scale effective workflows, avoiding redundant effort.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Inconsistent SEO Processes

  - [**Core Issue:** No standardized, company-wide process for foundational SEO tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Example:** Content audits are performed differently by each team, preventing the surfacing and adoption of best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [**Impact:** Inconsistent strategy quality. Some MEs use only basic SEMrush exports, while others are unfamiliar with advanced techniques like Jobs-to-be-Done (JTBD) frameworks.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Problem: Unactionable Scrunch Data

  - [**Challenge:** Scrunch provides a high volume of data without a clear playbook for action or impact measurement.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Example:** A report showed a client's competitors appearing in ChatGPT for 600+ prompts where the client did not.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Action Taken:** Mapped prompts to existing articles and used them in a content refresh workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Missing:** A method to track if the refresh actually improved ChatGPT visibility for those specific queries.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Process Gap:** The prompt creation process needs standardization.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
      - [**Issue:** A method that worked for one client (Strapi) produced a bloated, unactionable list of 1,500 queries for others (Rapid, Galileo, AMP).](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
      - [**Need:** A clear definition of "granular but not too granular" for prompt selection.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

### Problem: Looker Reporting Bottlenecks

  - [**Primary Bottleneck:** Manual data blending is required to combine GA4 and GSC data.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
      - [**Cause:** Incompatible data aggregation levels between the two platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [**Impact:** A time-consuming, manual process for MEs.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [**Solution:** Awaits a company-wide data warehouse project.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [**Secondary Bottleneck:** Ad-hoc client customization requests.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
      - [**Cause:** Clients have varied KPIs, leading to complex, one-off dashboard builds.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
      - [**Impact:** Each request can take a week to process, delaying other work.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)

### Proposed Solution: Centralize & Standardize

  - [**Talal's Role:** A horizontal role focused on standardizing and leveling up processes across the company.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [**Initial Focus:** Improve foundational SEO workflows (content audits, keyword research, clustering) before tackling advanced AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution for AEO:**](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [Build a central database of all internal LLM/AEO experiments.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [Systematically test promising workflows across multiple clients.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
      - [Talal will own these experiments, with MEs providing support.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution for Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
      - [Front-load dashboard creation into a new 2-week pre-sprint process.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This captures all client KPI requirements upfront, enabling a specialized resource to build the dashboard before the main engagement starts.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:** Share the content refresh workflow and any notes on LLM/AEO experiments with Talal.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [**Talal:**](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
      - [Review Vivek's materials to identify best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
      - [Continue gathering context on current workflows from other teams.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
      - [Explore formalizing a pre-sprint process to front-load dashboard creation.](https://fathom.video/share/V6g3HhYnZjTnuj-888FJXn1qEUFxzu23?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
